title: Ippadi Mazhai Lyrics Vedi Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Karthik, Saindhavi
Lyrics: Thamarai
Movie: Vedi
Music : Vijay Antony

Ippadi mazhai adithaal, naan
eppadi kudai pidipen
Ippadi alai adithaal, naan
eppadi kaal nanaipen

Ippadi kan imaithaal, naan
eppadi unnai rasipen
Ippadi nee sirithaal, naan
eppadi uyir pilaipen                      (ippadai mazhai.....)

Ippadi ippadiyen vali marithaal
eppadi eppadi naan nadanthiduven
Ippadi ippadiyen mugam sivanthal
eppadi eppadi naan mutham iduven

Ippadi ippadiye po koithaal
eppadi eppadi naan malarndhiduven
Ippadi ippadiye thadai vidhithaal
eppadi eppadi naan nerungiduven  (ippadai mazhai.....)

Ippadi ippadiye pootti kondaal
eppadi eppadi naan thiranthiduven
Ippadi ippadiye ne adam pidithaal
eppadi eppadi naan vilagiduven

Ippadi ippadiye kirangadithaal
Eppadi eppadi naan urangiduven
Ippadi ippadi nee kadhalithaal
eppadi eppadi naan maruthiduven (ippadai mazhai.....)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Ippadi Mazhai?

The song is a romantic and energetic melody that captures the joy and excitement of love.

Who are the singers of Ippadi Mazhai?

The song is sung by Karthik and Saindhavi.

Who composed the music for Vedi?

The music for Vedi was composed by Vijay Antony.

What is the release year of the movie Vedi?

The movie Vedi was released in 2011.

What role does the song play in the movie Vedi?

The song adds a vibrant and romantic touch to the film, enhancing the emotional connection between characters.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Ippadi Mazhai is a romantic and energetic song from the movie Vedi, beautifully sung by Karthik and Saindhavi. The lyrics by Thamarai poetically express the joy and excitement of love, while Vijay Antony's music adds a lively and engaging rhythm. The song is set against a backdrop of celebration, capturing the essence of happiness and romance. It evokes feelings of joy and is perfect for uplifting moments in the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ippadi Mazhai from Vedi is a delightful blend of Karthik and Saindhavi's enchanting vocals with Vijay Antony's vibrant music. The song captures the essence of romance and joy, making it a perfect addition to any celebration. With Thamarai's poetic lyrics, this track is a must-listen for fans of Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: If the rain falls like this, how will I hold the umbrella? If the waves hit like this, how will I keep my feet dry?
If my eyes close like this, how will I enjoy you? If you smile like this, how will I breathe?
If my path disappears like this, how will I walk? If my face fades like this, how will I kiss?
If everything is cut off like this, how will I bloom? If obstacles are placed like this, how will I get closer?
If everything is locked like this, how will I open up? If you insist like this, how will I move away?
If you scold like this, how will I sleep? If you love like this, how will I refuse?
